creator: cagney@tpgi.com.au
text:
Neither TRN nor NNTPCACHE install `inews' yet
	TRN wants to use inews to post articles.  Consequently,
	one can't post news articles using Pnews.

	(Perhaphs this is a good thing :-)

Fix: 

Good question!

	o	add a dependency for inn (say)
		which contains inews (from memory)

	o	have the nntpcache maintainers
		add inews?

	???
How-To-Repeat: 
	Pnews
	..
	.	
	.
	Check spelling, Send, Abort, Edit, or List? s
	inews: not found
